data.title: Itafos to release Q4 and FY 2025 results on March 18, 2026. Webcast available on March 23 at 4:30 p.m. ET.
data.description: Itafos Inc. (TSX-V: IFOS) (OTCQX: ITFS) has announced that its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 and the full year 2025 will be disclosed after the market closes on Wednesday, March 18, 2026. A recorded webcast featuring management commentary on the financial results, updates on the company's operations, and responses to common inquiries from analysts and investors will be accessible on Monday, March 23, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET. The webcast will be accessible on the Presentations & Events section of Itafos’ website, www.itafos.com/investors/presentations-fact-sheets/, and will remain available for viewing for 90 days.

data.title: Global orphan drugs market to exceed $350B by 2032 due to increasing genetic conditions and rare diseases incidence.
data.description: The orphan drugs market is experiencing significant growth due to the increasing global prevalence of genetic conditions and other rare diseases. This expansion is further driven by the substantial unmet demand for effective treatments. Many rare disorders continue to lack sufficient treatment options, contributing to the market's rapid development.

data.title: Fed's key inflation rate rises, GDP growth falls, rate-cut prospects diminish. News from Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Chances of a rate cut have decreased recently. Following the Federal Reserve's report of a significant increase in the key inflation rate and a notable drop in GDP growth, the likelihood of a rate cut has diminished. The post-Fed announcement coverage provides insights into this economic development.

data.title: Columbus McKinnon to present at J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference on March 17, 2026 at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Charlotte, North Carolina, Columbus McKinnon Corporation (Nasdaq: CMCO) disclosed its participation in the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference scheduled for March 17, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The Company will make a presentation during the event.

data.title: ADP jobs report reveals unexpected decline in private payrolls; S&P 500 is unsteady. BLS report is pending after Fed meeting.
data.description: The official jobs report from the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) is expected to be released after the Federal Reserve meeting. However, the recent ADP Jobs Report revealed a surprising decrease in private payrolls. This unexpected drop in private sector employment has caused fluctuations in the S&P 500 stock index. Stay tuned for the latest updates on the job market and stock performance.

data.title: Pangaea Logistics Solutions (Nasdaq: PANL) to release Q4 2025 results on March 10, 2026 after market close.
data.description: Global maritime logistics provider Pangaea Logistics Solutions is set to release their fourth quarter 2025 financial results on Tuesday, March 10, 2026, after the market closes. The company, listed on Nasdaq as PANL, will be sharing the details of their performance in this period with investors and the public. This announcement comes from their headquarters in Newport, Rhode Island, indicating a pivotal update in the company's financial status.

data.title: SM Energy sells $1 billion in senior notes due 2034 at 6.625% interest, issued at par.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, SM Energy Company revealed that it has set the price for an increased offering of $1.0 billion in total principal amount of 6.625% senior notes due 2034. The Notes are being issued at par. This marks a significant milestone for SM Energy as they move forward with this offering.

data.title: ShaMaran reports Q4 2025 revenue of $54.7 million, up 57% from 2024, with EBITDAX at $39.9 million, a 71% increase. Total debt at $143.8 million.
data.description: ShaMaran Petroleum Corp. released financial results for the quarter and year ending December 31, 2025. Revenue in Q4 2025 was $54.7 million, a 57% increase from Q4 2024, totaling $154.9 million for the full year 2025. Gross margin on oil sales increased by 60% in Q4 2025 to $30.5 million and $65.0 million for FY 2025. Net cash flow from operating activities in Q4 2025 was $4.7 million and $69.1 million for FY 2025. Adjusted EBITDAX for Q4 2025 was $39.9 million and $107.1 million for FY 2025. At the end of 2025, the company had cash of $42.1 million and gross debt of $143.8 million, with net debt of $101.6 million. As of March 4, 2026, cash was $39.1 million, gross debt remained at $143.8 million, and net debt stood at $104.7 million. Average daily oil production for Atrush and Sarsang fields in 2025 increased, with total gross production averaging 57.3 Mbopd. Shareholders will vote on moving the primary listing to Oslo and shifting corporate continuance from Canada to Bermuda to attract new investors and increase trading liquidity.

data.title: BCBSM opposes Michigan Medicine's 44% price hike demand, informs members of lockout from July 1.
data.description: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Michigan is speaking out against requests for a significant 44 percent increase in prices. The organization has started notifying its non-Medicare commercial customers and members about being denied access to Michigan Medicine due to this issue.

data.title: Ecopetrol proposes distribution of 2025 earnings, approved by board, for submission. Details undisclosed.
data.description: In Bogota, Colombia on March 4, 2026, Ecopetrol S.A. (BVC: ECOPETROL; NYSE: EC) ("Ecopetrol") has disclosed the approval by its board of directors of the proposal for the distribution of earnings for the year 2025. The proposal is set to be presented for further approval and implementation.

data.title: Liberty Mutual Insurance reports $1.699 billion net income for Q4 and $6.792 billion for full year 2025.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Boston, Liberty Mutual Holding Company Inc. disclosed that it, along with its subsidiaries, generated a net income attributable to LMHC totaling $1.699 billion for the three-month period ending on December 31, 2025. Over the twelve months of 2025, their income soared to $6.792 billion. This marked a significant increase from their previous financial results.

data.title: New Richmond American Community Desert Bloom at Monarch in Marana to host Grand Opening event on March 7, 2026.
data.description: Monarch's Desert Bloom is preparing for a grand unveiling on March 7 in Marana, Arizona. Scheduled for March 4, 2026, Richmond American Homes of Arizona, a branch of Sekisui House U.S., reveals exciting news about the inauguration of Desert Bloom at Monarch.

data.title: Viper Energy to offer 17,391,304 shares of stock via secondary offering by Diamondback Energy and affiliates, with potential for 2,608,696 more shares sold by Selling Stockholders.
data.description: Viper Energy, Inc. unveiled a secondary offering of 17,391,304 shares of its Class A common stock by the Selling Stockholders, including Diamondback Energy, Inc., EnCap Investments, L.P., and Oaktree Capital Management, L.P. The Secondary Offering is subject to market conditions, with an option for underwriters to acquire up to 2,608,696 additional shares from Viper. Viper itself will not gain any proceeds from this offering.

data.title: Travelers face ongoing flight cancellations due to US-Israel conflict with Iran, leading to endless disruptions worldwide.
data.description: Despite being located far from major cities like Dubai and Abu Dhabi, residents in the area are feeling the impact of increasing violence, with many experiencing frequent flight cancellations. The continuous disruptions have left individuals struggling as they navigate through the chaos, facing one cancellation after another.
